mapper.insert: INSERT INTO topic (title, description, created_by, created_at) VALUES (#{title}, #{description}, #{createdBy}, #{createdAt})
mapper.select: SELECT t.id, t.title, t.description, t.created_by, t.created_at, COALESCE(NULLIF(u.display_name, ''), u.username) AS created_by_name FROM topic t LEFT JOIN users u ON t.created_by = u.id WHERE t.id = #{id}

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM topic
(title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR description LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
